tasks.subject: Batch3-Task 1: 依赖三件套 + Valkey flush + problem 模型
tasks.description:
**Goal:** security/data-redis/actuator/jjwt 依赖进场,测试基类补 Valkey flush 与测试 JWT 键,platform.web problem 模型落地。

**Files:**
- Modify: build.gradle.kts、AbstractIntegrationTest.kt
- Create: platform/web/{ProblemType,GlobalExceptionHandler}.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- jjwt 最新 0.12.x 查证;flush 每测试;problem 稳定 URI;16 测试仍绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["build.gradle.kts", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/web/"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["jjwt latest 0.12.x sourced", "valkey flushed per test", "problem model with stable URIs", "check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch3-Task 2: platform.security 基座(默认拒绝 + JWT + jti fail-closed)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JWT 编解码(sid/UUIDv7 jti)、jti 黑名单 fail-closed、过滤器、PublicRoutesContributor、默认拒绝链。

**Files:**
- Create: platform/security/ 8 文件
- Test: UuidV7Test、SecurityChainTest

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 无票 401 unauthenticated;health 公开;黑名单 401;Valkey down 带票 503;secret 二选一 fail fast

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "frontier", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/security/"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default deny with contributor permits", "jwt roundtrip with sid and uuidv7 jti", "blacklist fail-closed 503", "check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch3-Task 3: identity 纯组件(canonicalizer + TOTP + crypto)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 规范化、RFC 6238 TOTP(digits 参数化)+Base32、AES-GCM AAD 加密——纯单元。

**Files:**
- Create: identity/internal/{UsernameCanonicalizer,Totp,TotpSecretCrypto}.kt + 3 单测

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- RFC 向量 8 位全过;AAD 篡改必拒;IV 随机;check 绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/identity/internal/"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rfc vectors pass at 8 digits", "AAD tamper rejected", "base32 tested", "check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch3-Task 4: token 生命周期(repos + TokenService)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** refresh 仓储(原子旋转/重放/family 吊销)+ TokenService,含并发测试。

**Files:**
- Create: identity/internal/{RefreshTokenRepository,TokenService}.kt + TokenLifecycleTest

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 原子旋转;重放吊销 family;并发双 refresh 单胜者;明文不落库;check 绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "frontier", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/identity/internal/RefreshTokenRepository.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/identity/internal/TokenService.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["atomic rotation claim", "reuse revokes family", "concurrent double refresh single winner", "check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch3-Task 5: C 端鉴权(service + 登录保护 + 端点 + 集成测试)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** register/login/refresh/logout/me/changePassword + 锁定/限流 + 统一 401 + fail-closed 测试。

**Files:**
- Create: identity/internal/{CustomerRepository,LoginProtection,AuthService}.kt、web/{dto,AuthController}.kt、IdentityPublicRoutes.kt + AuthFlowTest/ValkeyDownTest

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 401 body 逐字节相同;锁定期正确密码也 401;IP 429;logout 凭 sid;Valkey down 503;check 绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "frontier", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/identity/internal/", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AuthFlowTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ValkeyDownTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uniform 401 byte-identical", "lockout rejects correct password", "logout revokes via sid", "valkey down fails closed", "check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch3-Task 6: admin TOTP 鉴权 + 边界收尾
tasks.description:
**Goal:** admin login(启用后强制 TOTP)/enroll/confirm + CAS step;删 marker、根包断言、C7 增补、CLAUDE.md/WalletProps 收尾。

**Files:**
- Create: identity/internal/{AdminUserRepository,TotpVerifier,AdminAuthService}.kt、web/AdminAuthController.kt + AdminTotpFlowTest
- Delete: IdentityInternalMarker.kt;Modify: ModuleBoundaryTest/架构文档 C7/CLAUDE.md/WalletProps

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 同 code 二次 401(CAS);step 单调;customer 访问 enroll 403;根包探针红→绿;check 绿 + 最终测试数

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "frontier", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/identity/internal/", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt", "docs/architecture-redesign.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["totp mandatory once enrolled", "cas burns each step", "root package assertion with probe", "C7 amendment landed", "check green"]}
```
